scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev --workspace @blackjack/api" "npm run dev --workspace @blackjack/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @blackjack/contracts && npm run build --workspace @blackjack/engine && npm run build --workspace @blackjack/api && npm run build --workspace @blackjack/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @blackjack/contracts && npm run test --workspace @blackjack/engine && npm run test --workspace @blackjack/api && npm run test --workspace @blackjack/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @blackjack/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @blackjack/engine && npm run typecheck --workspace @blackjack/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @blackjack/web
